summary: For a junior dev, much of your day is spent on 'invisible' work—fixing silent bugs, refactoring legacy code, and updating databases. This powerful sermon reframes those unglamorous efforts through an Islamic lens, showing how silent, sincere contributions hold the ultimate spiritual value and why keeping your intentions pure builds both character and career resilience.
